# DOCTRINE — AMG Agent Roster v2 (post-Hercules-as-chief, post-dedup)

**Status:** ACTIVE
**Effective:** 2026-04-26
**Supersedes:** v1 (2026-04-26 morning, 33-agent count) and the original Codex-era roster
**Runtime mirror:** `~/.openclaw/agents/_AMG_AGENT_ARMY_MANIFEST.json` (regenerated by `scripts/build_amg_agent_army.py`)

## 1. Canonical naming rule

ONE name per role. Never recycle a name. Never let two slots share the same logical identity. Alert systems are wired to specific names — duplicates cause routing chaos.

| Pattern | Meaning | Examples |
|---|---|---|
| `atlas_<name>` | Atlas-system OpenClaw factory worker | `atlas_titan`, `atlas_einstein`, `atlas_judge_deepseek` |
| bare `mercury` / `nestor` / `alexander` | Hercules's direct support layer | These three only |
| bare `warden` / `artisan` / `archimedes` / `aletheia` / `cerberus` | Cross-cutting specialist | These five only |
| `amg_<avatar>` / `amg_<avatar>_builder` / `amg_<avatar>_researcher` | AMG subscriber-facing | 7 avatars × 3 roles = 21 agents |
| **RESERVED bare names — NOT OpenClaw agents** | | `titan` (Claude Code), `hercules` (Kimi web — uses `atlas_hercules` in OpenClaw) |

## 2. Active dispatch roster (40 unique agents)

### Tier 0 — Chief (1)
- **atlas_hercules** — Chief Executive Operations Manager (Kimi K2.6 voice via web tab; OpenClaw slot for KB + dispatch routing)

### Tier 1 — Atlas factory workers (10)
- atlas_titan
- atlas_odysseus
- atlas_hector
- atlas_judge_perplexity
- atlas_judge_deepseek
- atlas_research_perplexity
- atlas_research_gemini
- atlas_einstein
- atlas_hallucinometer
- atlas_eom

### Tier 2 — AMG subscriber-facing (21 = 7 × 3)
For each avatar in {alex, maya, jordan, sam, riley, nadia, lumina}:
- `amg_<avatar>` (front strategist)
- `amg_<avatar>_builder`
- `amg_<avatar>_researcher`

### Tier 3 — Hercules support (3)
- **mercury** — Hercules's hands (SSH, file ops, browser, Infisical retrieval)
- **nestor** — UX/mockups, Apple-polish design (Kimi K2.6)
- **alexander** — Brand/copy/voice (Kimi K2.6)

### Tier 4 — Cross-cutting specialists (5)
- **warden** — Operational cop (idle/false-completion/factory-stall/lock-leak)
- **artisan** — Apple-polish QA (CRO Lumina KB + 5-dim rubric, floor 9.3)
- **archimedes** — Deep research (Perplexity-Computer-equivalent) + daily agent upgrader
- **aletheia** — Anti-hallucination enforcer (verifies claims against MCP/fs/git)
- **cerberus** — Security guardian (Mac + VPS + agents; dual-signal floor; defensive only)

## 3. Decommissioned slots (2026-04-26)

| Slot | Why | Absorbed by | Folder kept? |
|---|---|---|---|
| **atlas_achilles** | Codex out of credits; role absorbed by Hercules + Mercury | atlas_hercules, mercury | Yes — for Phase II.2 extraction |
| **achilles** (bare) | Bare-name duplicate of atlas_achilles | atlas_hercules, mercury | Yes — archival only |
| **titan** (bare OpenClaw slot) | Legacy duplicate of atlas_titan; bare `titan` is Claude Code's identity, not a fleet agent | atlas_titan | Yes — but never dispatch |
| **hector** (bare) | Bare-name duplicate of atlas_hector | atlas_hector | Yes — archival only |
| **odysseus** (bare) | Bare-name duplicate of atlas_odysseus | atlas_odysseus | Yes — archival only |
| **main** | Generic OpenClaw scaffold placeholder | — | OpenClaw runtime compat |

**Hard rule:** never reuse any of these names for a new agent. Pick a different Greek name from `DOCTRINE_GREEK_CODENAMES.md`.

## 4. Pre-add checklist (before scaffolding any new agent)

1. `grep <name> ~/titan-harness/plans/DOCTRINE_AMG_AGENT_ROSTER_v2.md` — name must NOT appear
2. `grep <name> ~/.openclaw/agents/_AMG_AGENT_ARMY_MANIFEST.json` — name must NOT appear in `active_dispatch_roster` OR `decommissioned[]`
3. `ls ~/.openclaw/agents/<name>/` — folder must NOT exist
4. Greek codename per `DOCTRINE_GREEK_CODENAMES.md` — picks 3-5 candidates, lock with Solon
5. Update this doctrine file (add to roster + tier section), the manifest, AND `~/.openclaw/agents/_AMG_AGENT_ARMY_MANIFEST.json`
6. Commit + auto-mirror per Hercules Triangle §17

## 5. Why this dedup matters (the real cost of name collisions)

- `agent_dispatch_bridge.py` routes by exact name match. Two slots with the same name → dispatch goes to the wrong one (or one always wins).
- `warden_enforcer.py` polls per-agent for activity. Bare-name `titan` polled separately from `atlas_titan` doubles the heartbeat noise.
- `mercury_mcp_notifier.py` filters decisions by `task:<id>` and `agent:<name>` tags. Duplicate names = duplicate notifications.
- Cron jobs scoped per agent name = duplicate triggers.
- Hercules's mental model: he assumes one name = one agent. Dual-naming breaks his audit gate ("did atlas_titan finish task X?" / "well, titan finished it but atlas_titan is still locked...").

## 6. Greek codename rule (per CLAUDE.md §14)

Every agent name is a Greek mythology figure with a clear functional fit. Current locks:
- Hephaestus → DOCTRINE_AMG_MODEL_ROUTING (model assignment forge)
- Ploutos → DOCTRINE_AMG_COST_PROJECTIONS (cost economics)
- Hermes (locked, CLAUDE.md §15.4) → Voice AI Path A
- Iris (locked) → Perplexity Computer task delegation
- Argus Panoptes (locked) → RADAR never-lose-anything queue
- Hippocrates (locked) → Self-healing layer of Solon OS
- Aletheia (locked 2026-04-26) → Anti-hallucination enforcer
- Cerberus (locked 2026-04-26) → Security guardian (3-headed gates)
- Archimedes (locked 2026-04-26) → Deep research engine + daily upgrader
- Hercules (locked, Solon directive 2026-04-26) → Chief Executive Operations Manager (atlas_hercules slot)
- Mercury (locked) → Hercules's hands
- Warden (locked 2026-04-26) → Operational cop *(English not Greek — exception for clarity; if Solon prefers Greek, propose Themis or Minos as alternates)*

Pending Solon lock:
- Artisan → Quality enforcer *(English; Greek alternate: Hephaestus is taken — propose Daedalus)*
